name: PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)

sections.details:
The scheme "PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)" by the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, Government of India aims to formalize street vendors and enhance their economic opportunities through providing collateral-free working capital loans, interest subsidy, and digital transaction incentives to street vendors. It was launched on 1st June 2020 as a central sector scheme. The scheme supports vendors in restarting and expanding their businesses. It also promotes digital payments to increase financial inclusion. Street vendors include hawkers, thelewala, rehriwala, and others engaged in small-scale vending activities.
The scheme aims to formalize the street vendors and open up new opportunities for this sector to move up the economic ladder. Street vendors represent a very important constituent of the urban informal economy and play a significant role in ensuring availability of the goods and services at affordable rates at the doorstep of the city dwellers. They are known as vendors, hawkers, thelewala, rehriwala, theliphadwala, etc. in different areas/ contexts. The goods supplied by them include vegetables, fruits, ready-to-eat street food, tea, pakodas, bread, eggs, textile, apparel, footwear, artisan products, books/ stationary, etc. The services include barber shops, cobblers, pan shops, laundry services, etc.
sections.benefits:
> **Working Capital Loan:**

  - **1st Tranche:** Loan up to ₹15,000/-; repayment within 12 months.  - **2nd Tranche:** Loan up to ₹25,000/-; repayment within 18 months.  - **3rd Tranche:** Loan up to ₹50,000/-; repayment within 36 months.  - Next tranche available on timely or early repayment.
  - No prepayment penalty on early repayment.

> **Interest Subsidy:**

  - Subsidy at 7% per annum on loan amount.
  - Credited quarterly to beneficiary’s bank account.
  - Applicable only for standard (non-NPA) accounts.
  - Valid up to 31st March 2033.

> **Digital Transaction Cashback:**

  - Cashback up to ₹100/- per month for digital transactions.

> **Credit Guarantee Support:**

  - 31.87% guarantee cover for 1st tranche loan.
  - 8.25% guarantee cover for 2nd tranche loan.
  - 6% guarantee cover for 3rd tranche loan.
  - No charges for lending institutions.

> **UPI Linked RuPay Credit Card:**

  - Initial credit limit of ₹10,000/-; extendable up to ₹30,000/-.
  - Validity of 5 years.
  - Available after successful repayment of 2nd tranche loan.
sections.eligibility:
- Street vendors in possession of Certificate of Vending / Identity Card issued by Urban Local Bodies (ULBs).
  - The vendors, who have been identified in the survey but have not been issued Certificate of Vending / Identity Card.
  - Street Vendors left out of the ULB-led identification survey or who have started vending after completion of the survey and have been issued a Letter of Recommendation (LoR) to that effect by the ULB / Town Vending Committee (TVC).
  - The vendors of surrounding development/ peri-urban/rural areas vending in the geographical limits of the ULBs, who have been issued a Letter of Recommendation (LoR) to that effect by the ULB / TVC.
sections.application:
### Application mode: Online

**Step 1:** Visit [https://pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in/ ](https://pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in/)and click on the "Log In" button on the homepage.
**Step 2:** Enter Mobile number and captcha. Click request OTP.
**Step 3:** After successful login, select valid "vendor category" among the available options. Enter "**Survey Reference Number**" (SRN) which is mandatory.
**Step 4:** On entering these basic details, fill the application form online, upload the relevant documents and submit.
**Note:**

- For any kind of clarification and access detailed stepwise process, refer [User Manual](https://pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in/Default/ViewFile/?id=Helping+User+Manual+For+First+Term+Other+State.pdf&path=MiscFiles).- For any query one can call on the toll free number i.e 1800111979 between 9.30 AM to 6.00 PM on Monday to Saturday except national holidays.
- **Contact Details:** [Click here](https://pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in/Home/Contact).

### Application mode: Offline

**Step 1:** Understand the information documents required to fill out the [Loan application form (LAF)](https://pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in/Default/ViewFile/?id=PM+SVANidhi+LAF.pdf&path=MiscFiles) for the Scheme.
**Step 2:** Keep all the information ready before you start the application process.
**Step 3:** Ensure the mobile phone is linked to the Aadhaar number.
**Step 4:** This will be required for e-KYC/Aadhaar validation during online application process.
**Step 5:** It will also help you to get a letter of Recommendation from ULB (in case required).
**Step 6:** It will also help you avail future benefits under Government welfare schemes.
**Step 7:** Check your eligibility status as per the scheme Rules.
**Step 8:** One will fall in one of the [4 categories of Street vendors](https://pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in/Home/PreApplication).
**Step 9:** Check your status and the documents/ information that you need to keep ready.
sections.documents:
> **For 1st Loan :**

**For Category A and B vendors:**

   1. Certificate of Vending
   1. Identity Card

**For Category C and D vendors:**

   1. Letter of Recommendation

>  **KYC documents required in addition to CoV/ID/LoR :**

   1. Aadhaar Card
   1. Voter Identity Card
   1. Driving License
   1. MNREGA Card
   1. PAN Card

> **For Letter of Recommendation :**

   1. Copy of Account Statement/Passbook
   1. Copy of Membership Card/any other proof of membership
   1. Any other document to substantiate the claim as a vendor
   1. Request letter to ULB

> **For Second Loan**

   1. Loan Closure Document
sections.faq:
**Q: What is PM SVANidhi Scheme?**

A: The PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi scheme is a government initiative aimed at providing financial assistance to street vendors affected by the COVID-19 pandemic.

**Q: Who is eligible to apply for the PM SVANidhi Scheme?**

A: Street vendors who have been operating their business for at least one year prior to March 24, 2020, and have been in possession of a valid ID proof are eligible to apply for the scheme.

**Q: What is the age limit to apply for the PM SVANidhi Scheme?**

A: There is no age limit to apply for the PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi scheme.

**Q: What is the maximum loan amount that can be availed under this scheme?**

A: Street vendors can avail of a working capital loan of up to Rs. 10,000 under the PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi scheme.

**Q: What is the interest rate on the loan provided under this scheme?**

A: The interest rate on the loan provided under this scheme is 7%.

**Q: How can one apply for the PM SVANidhi Scheme?**

A: Applicants can apply for the scheme online through the official website of their respective State or Union Territory.

**Q: Is there any processing fee to apply for the PM SVANidhi Scheme?**

A: A: No, there is no processing fee to apply for the PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi scheme.

**Q: What documents are required to apply for the PM SVANidhi Scheme?**

A: A: Applicants need to provide a valid ID proof, a certificate of vending/registration, and a recent photograph to apply for the scheme.

**Q: Can an individual apply for the PM SVANidhi Scheme multiple times?**

A: A: No, an individual can apply for the scheme only once.

**Q: Can an individual apply for the scheme if they have availed of a loan under any other government scheme?**

A: Yes, an individual can apply for the scheme even if they have availed of a loan under any other government scheme.

**Q: What is the repayment period for the loan provided under this scheme?**

A: The loan provided under this scheme has to be repaid within one year of availing it.

**Q: Is collateral required to avail of the loan under this scheme?**

A: No, collateral is not required to avail of the loan under the PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi scheme.

**Q: Can the loan amount be used for any purpose related to the street vending business?**

A: Yes, the loan amount can be used for any purpose related to the street vending business.

**Q: What is the benefit of availing of the loan under this scheme?**

A: The loan provided under this scheme can be used to restart or expand the street vending business, thereby providing financial stability to the street vendor.

**Q: What is the repayment mode for the loan provided under this scheme?**

A: The loan provided under this scheme has to be repaid in monthly installments.
